section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.content: We collect information you provide when registering for an account, including: full name, email address, phone number, and payment information. In addition, we may collect usage data such as IP address, browser type, pages you visit and time of use to improve the service experience.

section2.title: 2. Purpose of Using Information
items: Send service-related notifications, including booking confirmations and system updates.

section3.title: 3. Sharing Information
section3.content: We do not sell, trade, or transfer your personal information to third parties, except for partners who provide services to support the operation of the platform (e.g., payment gateways) and in cases required by law.

section4.title: 4. Data Security
section4.content: We apply appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, loss or destruction. Passwords are one-way encrypted and all connections use the HTTPS protocol.

section5.title: 5. Cookies
section5.content: We use session cookies to maintain login status and analytics cookies to understand how users interact with the platform. You can disable cookies in your browser settings, however some features may not function properly.

section6.title: 6. Your Rights
section6.content: You have the right to access, edit or request deletion of your personal information at any time by contacting us via support email. We will respond within 7 working days.

section7.title: 7. Contact
section7.content: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us via the email displayed in the footer.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: By accessing or using the platform, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. If you do not agree with any part, please do not use the service.

section2.title: 2. User Account
items: You must be 18 years of age or older to register and use the service.
You are responsible for maintaining the security of your login information.
Each user can only create one account. Duplicate accounts may be deleted.
Account information must be accurate and updated promptly.

section3.title: 3. Service Usage
section3.content: You agree not to use the platform to:
items: Violate any applicable laws or regulations.
Send spam, fraudulent or harmful content.
Infringe upon the privacy or intellectual property rights of others.
Disrupt or interfere with our systems and servers.

section4.title: 4. Payment and Refund
section4.content: Wallet top-up transactions are processed through certified payment gateways. Wallet balance can only be used on the platform. We do not refund wallet balance unless there is a confirmed technical error from the system side.

section5.title: 5. Service Packages
section5.content: Upgrade packages (Gold, Diamond) are effective according to the selected billing cycle. Packages automatically renew unless you cancel before the renewal date. We reserve the right to change prices or package features with at least 30 days' prior notice.

section6.title: 6. Account Termination
section6.content: We reserve the right to suspend or delete accounts if we detect violations of the terms, fraud or harm to other users. You can also request account deletion at any time by contacting support.

section7.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
section7.content: Service is provided on an 'as is' basis. We do not guarantee service will always be continuous and are not liable for indirect damages arising from the use of the platform.

section8.title: 8. Changes to Terms
section8.content: We may update these terms periodically. Any changes will be notified via email or in-app notification. Continued use of the service after changes are applied means you accept the new terms.

section1.title: 1. What Are Cookies?
section1.content: Cookies are small text files that a website stores on your device when you visit. They help the platform remember your actions and preferences (such as login state, language and currency) over a period of time, so you don't have to re-enter them every time you return.

section2.title: 2. Types of Cookies We Use
items: Essential cookies — required for the platform to function, such as keeping you signed in and remembering the role you are currently using.
Preference cookies — remember your choices like interface language, display currency and light/dark theme.
Functional cookies — support features such as chat sessions and saved drafts.
Analytics cookies — help us understand how the platform is used so we can improve it.

section3.title: 3. Essential Cookies
section3.content: These cookies store your authentication token and the role you are currently active in (client or worker). Without them you cannot stay logged in or use protected areas of the platform. They cannot be turned off through our settings.

section4.title: 4. Preference Cookies
section4.content: We use cookies to remember your selected language (Vietnamese, English or Chinese), your preferred display currency and your light or dark theme, so your experience stays consistent across visits.

section5.title: 5. Analytics Cookies
section5.content: We may use analytics tools to collect anonymous, aggregated information about how visitors use the platform — for example, which pages are visited most. This helps us improve performance and usability. These cookies do not identify you personally.

section6.title: 6. Third-Party Cookies
section6.content: Some features rely on trusted third-party services (such as sign-in providers and payment gateways). These providers may set their own cookies, governed by their respective privacy policies.

section7.title: 7. Managing Your Cookies
section7.content: You can control or delete cookies through your browser settings at any time. Please note that disabling essential cookies will prevent you from logging in and using core features of the platform.

section8.title: 8. Changes & Contact
section8.content: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Any significant changes will be announced on the platform. If you have questions, please contact us through our support channels.

BookingProcess.title: How Booking Works
BookingProcess.intro: Booking on PR1AS is simple and transparent. Below is each step from finding a worker to completing a service, so you know exactly what to expect.
BookingProcess.rulesTitle: Good to Know Before You Book

rules.label: Earliest booking
rules.value: At least 2 hours before the start time.

rules.label: Worker confirmation deadline
rules.value: Workers confirm no later than 6 hours before the start. For short-notice bookings they have 60 minutes to confirm, otherwise the request expires automatically.

BookingProcess.cancelIntro: How cancellation works depends on the booking status and timing:

cancelRules.title: Cancelling while "Pending"
cancelRules.description: Free of charge and affects no one — the worker has not committed to the slot yet.

cancelRules.title: Early cancellation (more than 24 hours before start)
cancelRules.description: No reputation penalty. You can cancel a confirmed booking freely within this window.

cancelRules.title: Late cancellation (within 24 hours of start)
cancelRules.description: If the worker had already confirmed, cancelling late reduces your reputation score.

cancelRules.title: After the service has started ("In Progress")
cancelRules.description: The booking can no longer be cancelled unilaterally. Any issue must go through a complaint so an admin can review it.

cancelRules.title: Worker cancellation
cancelRules.description: If a worker cancels a confirmed booking, their reputation score is reduced.

BookingProcess.disputeNote: After a service is completed, you have 3 days to open a complaint. Once that window passes, the result is considered accepted and can no longer be disputed.

steps.title: Find a service or worker
steps.description: Browse services or worker profiles, compare ratings, prices and availability, then open the profile you are interested in.

steps.title: Send a booking request
steps.description: Choose your appointment time, describe what you need and submit the request. Your booking is created with the status "Pending" while it awaits the worker's response.

steps.title: Worker confirms or declines
steps.description: The worker reviews your request and either confirms or declines it. Requests that are not responded to within the allowed time automatically expire, so you are never left waiting indefinitely.

steps.title: Service is carried out
steps.description: Once confirmed, the booking moves to "In Progress". You and the worker coordinate directly to complete the work as agreed.

steps.title: Confirm completion
steps.description: When the work is done, the worker marks it finished and the booking moves to "Waiting for acceptance". You review the result and confirm to mark it "Completed".

steps.title: Leave a review
steps.description: After completion, share your rating and feedback. Reviews help other clients choose and help good workers stand out.

BookingProcess.paymentContent: PR1AS connects clients and workers but does not hold payment on your behalf. Pricing and payment for each booking are arranged directly between you and the worker. Always agree on the price and terms before the service begins.

statuses.label: Pending
statuses.description: Your request has been sent and is waiting for the worker to respond.

statuses.label: Confirmed
statuses.description: The worker accepted your request and the appointment is set.

statuses.label: Rejected
statuses.description: The worker declined the request. You can book another worker.

statuses.label: In Progress
statuses.description: The service is currently being carried out.

statuses.label: Waiting for acceptance
statuses.description: The worker marked the work done; it is waiting for you to confirm.

statuses.label: Completed
statuses.description: The service is finished and confirmed by both sides.

statuses.label: Cancelled
statuses.description: The booking was cancelled by the client or the worker.

statuses.label: Disputed
statuses.description: A complaint has been opened and is being reviewed.

statuses.label: Expired
statuses.description: The request was not responded to in time and expired automatically.

BookingProcess.helpContent: If something goes wrong with a booking, you can open a complaint from your bookings list, or contact our support team and we will help resolve it.

Location.chooseProvinceFirst: Select a province to view wards.

hero.title: Connecting people with services they can trust
hero.subtitle: PR1AS is the marketplace where clients meet reliable workers and freelancers — discover services, book with confidence, and manage everything in one place.

what.title: What is PR1AS
paragraphs: PR1AS is a full-service platform that connects clients with verified workers and freelancers offering a wide range of professional and companionship services.
From discovering the right provider to booking, chatting, and paying securely online, PR1AS brings every step of the journey into one seamless experience.
We are built around trust, transparency and quality — so both clients and service providers can focus on what truly matters.

why.title: Why Choose Us
why.subtitle: We obsess over a safe, fair and effortless experience for everyone on the platform.

items.title: Verified & trusted
items.description: Every provider goes through identity and quality checks, with a reputation system that keeps standards high.

items.title: Quality you can rely on
items.description: Real reviews, transparent profiles and ratings help you choose the right person with confidence.

items.title: Transparent payments
items.description: Clear pricing in your currency and secure online top-up — no hidden fees, no surprises.

items.title: Support that cares
items.description: A responsive team and built-in dispute resolution stand behind every booking you make.

features.title: Our Service Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to find, book and manage services — beautifully simple.

items.title: Easy booking
items.description: Browse availability and book your preferred provider in just a few taps.

items.title: Real-time chat
items.description: Message providers instantly to align on details before and after your booking.

items.title: Ratings & reviews
items.description: Make informed choices with honest feedback from the community.

items.title: Secure wallet
items.description: Top up and pay securely with a multi-currency wallet built for convenience.

items.title: Smart notifications
items.description: Stay on top of bookings, reminders and messages with timely alerts.

items.title: Multi-language
items.description: Enjoy PR1AS in English, Vietnamese and Chinese — wherever you are.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Explore the community and find the right service provider for you today.

LegalResponsibility.title: Legal Responsibility
LegalResponsibility.intro: To protect users' interests and ensure transparency, we publicly disclose our accountability principles and the application's legal-compliance status.
principles: Legally there must be a legal entity (a directly responsible party) that directly manages, operates and exploits the application.

There is no disclaimer of responsibility when a civil transaction arises — the application and its owning company or the directly responsible person must explain and prove non-involvement in any violation through documents or concrete evidence.
LegalResponsibility.dossierTitle: Documents submitted to the Ministry of Industry and Trade
dossier: Application for registration of an e-commerce service-providing application.
A certified copy of the business registration certificate, investment certificate or investment license (for traders).
Scheme for providing the e-commerce service.
Operating regulations for the e-commerce service-providing application.
A sample service contract or cooperation agreement between the enterprise and the traders, organizations or individuals participating in trading, auctions or promotions on that application.
General transaction conditions applicable to the trading, auction or promotion of goods and services on the application (if any).
A power of attorney for the person submitting the dossier and receiving the result, if that person is not the legal representative of the enterprise.

LegalResponsibilityModal.title: Legal responsibility & transparency
LegalResponsibilityModal.description: The application has a legal entity / directly responsible party that manages and operates it. There is no disclaimer of liability for civil transactions — the operator must explain and prove its position with documents and concrete evidence.
